properties.Notes:
This ramp is a designated tournament ramp and is expected to be quite busy during the tournament season.
This ramp is not useable at lower water levels, primarily during winter drawdowns.
Be advised that scheduling a tournament release site at the Port Oliver area during the mid Sept. –  early Nov. time frame may subject your tournament released bass to stressful conditions (low oxygen levels) that can lead to poor bass survival.  Consider using the state park or Narrows ramps for bass release sites or for all tournament activity (launch & release) during this time frame.
The area now has new fishing piers and updated facilities including an ADA ramp and playground.

properties.NAME: Ohio River - Louisville
properties.Directions: Starting May 6th, 2019 and running for 100 days, there will be bridge work on West Highway 524 heading towards Westport.  The 18-mile Creek Bridge will be closed during this time.  Boaters wishing to use the Westport Boat Ramp are asked follow detour signage on Highway 42 and to take East Highway 524 (may show Covington Ridge Road on some maps) towards Westport.  Boaters should stay on East Highway 524 all of the way to Westport, as there are no shortcuts off that highway.  Boaters should watch for boat ramp directional signage when they reach the town of Westport.
properties.Notes: 18 Mile Creek Bridge will be closed for 3 months starting in May.  Please see directions for alternate routes.  Detour signs will be posted on the route.
